title: watcher-install output data
description: Shape of the ``data`` field on a ``watcher-install`` envelope.

installed.description: Whether a cluster-side watcher is installed after this call (install: a rung took; uninstall: always false; status: whether one is present).
installed.title: Installed

mechanism.description: Which rung of the ladder is in effect — cron / scrontab / job / none.
mechanism.title: Mechanism

reason.description: Human-readable outcome. On mechanism='none' this is the LOUD 'overnight blindness persists' message.
reason.title: Reason

detail.description: Mechanism-specific detail: the cron marker line, the submitted job id, or the probe failures that sank each rung.
detail.title: Detail

probes.description: Per-rung probe verdicts (crontab / scrontab / job), for legibility and debugging why a given rung was or was not selected.
probes.title: Probes
